---
name: "\U0001F4A1 Feature Request"
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of what problem this feature would solve.
Ex: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

What alternative solutions or workarounds have you considered?

## Provider Request (if applicable)

If you're requesting support for a new video provider:

- **Provider URL pattern:** [e.g., `https://example.com/v/*`]
- **Public availability:** Is this site publicly accessible?
- **Sample URLs:** 1-2 example URLs for testing

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.
